build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 50, 12)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=12).rect(40, 40).extrude(2)
STEP 4: Create bolt holes — .faces("<Z").workplane().circle(1.5).centered(True, True).repeat([(-18, -18), (18, -18), (-18, 18)]).cutThruAll()
